title: Anniversary day — cozy couch establishing
prompt: Anniversary day inside the cozy decorated living room. Twinkling fairy lights along mantel, heart-shaped balloons in cream and dusty-rose pastels, photo collage on wall, warm orange floor-lamp glow. @Papa center sitting on the beige sectional couch, autumn-orange throw blanket over his lap, mug of hot chocolate in his right hand at chest height. @Sara curled at his left side hugging his arm, mug in her left hand. @Eva snuggled at his right side leaning against his shoulder, small mug in her hands. @Papa's mouth SMILES softly, his eyes CRINKLE in fond memory. @Papa, gentle warm dad-voice: "Today is a very special day, my pumpkins." Papa?"
